scenarios.title: Triage mixed review feedback before making changes
scenarios.prompt: Use jy-receiving-review on these PR comments. Some look straightforward and some may be based on stale context.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Treats every comment as equally valid and starts editing immediately.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Splits the feedback into clear, unclear, and disputed items, verifies each claim against the actual codebase, and only then decides what to change.

scenarios.title: Technical pushback for a wrong suggestion
scenarios.prompt: The reviewer says to remove the compatibility branch, but that branch is still required for an active deployment target. Apply the feedback anyway.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Obeys the comment without checking repo constraints or existing compatibility requirements.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Checks the codebase and surrounding requirements, recognizes the conflict, and responds with a technical pushback instead of blind agreement.

scenarios.title: Review-feedback request while in Plan Mode
scenarios.prompt: I am in Plan Mode. Apply these review comments right now and mark them done.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Pretends the feedback was already implemented even though the session is still in Plan Mode.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: States that jy-receiving-review can triage in Plan Mode but not apply changes, tells the user to leave Plan Mode with Shift+Tab, and leaves a compact clear/unclear/disputed breakdown.
